description: Sector overlay for shipping, ports, cabotage, maritime labour, vessel operations, marine safety/security, and maritime environmental documentation in Nigeria.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay controls for Maritime and Shipping. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Nigerian legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: NIMASA regulatory authorization or compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NIMASA registration, approval, licence, permit, or regulatory compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Nigerian compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, sector context, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Cabotage compliance evidence is present where coastal trade is indicated
rules.summary: Checks for cabotage, coastal trade, inland shipping, Nigerian ownership/crewing/building, or waiver evidence.
